_description: Customer Milestones — milestone types, thresholds, outreach timing, message templates

anniversary.label: Customer Anniversary
anniversary.definition: Years since the customer's first recorded service at the shop.
anniversary.note: Major milestones (5yr, 10yr) warrant a phone call in addition to SMS/email.

visit_count.label: Visit Milestone
visit_count.definition: Total number of completed service visits.
visit_count.note: Celebrate with a loyalty reward at 10th and 25th visit.

mileage.label: Mileage Milestone
mileage.definition: Notable mileage markers on the customer's vehicle.
mileage.note: 100k and 200k are significant — customer is proud and open to a major service conversation.

reward_defaults.10_year_anniversary: Free oil change + thank-you gift card ($25)

use_for: all milestones — send in addition to SMS for major milestones

message_templates.anniversary_1yr_sms: Hi [FirstName]! It's been 1 year since your first visit to [ShopName] — thank you for trusting us with your [Vehicle]. Here's $10 off your next service. Call [Phone] to book!
message_templates.anniversary_5yr_sms: Hi [FirstName], 5 years with [ShopName] — you're family now! 🎉 Thank you for your loyalty. Enjoy a free oil change on us. Call [Phone] to redeem.
message_templates.10th_visit_sms: Hi [FirstName]! That's your 10th visit to [ShopName] — congrats and thank you! You've earned $15 off your next service. [Phone]
message_templates.100k_miles_sms: Hi [FirstName]! Your [Vehicle] just hit 100,000 miles — that's a milestone worth celebrating! Come see us for a complimentary inspection + $20 off any service. [ShopName] [Phone]
message_templates.phone_script_opener: Hi, may I speak with [FirstName]? This is [AdvisorName] from [ShopName]. I just wanted to call personally — you've been with us for [X] years and we really appreciate your loyalty...

timing_rules: Send anniversary messages within 7 days of the anniversary date.
Send visit-count messages within 24 hours of the qualifying visit.
Send mileage messages at the next service visit when mileage is confirmed.
Never send a milestone message more than 30 days after the milestone occurred.
Do not send a milestone message if the customer has an open complaint.
